content.en:
Not long after Ye Tiangang came back, an unexpected person arrived.

"Master!"

Ye Tian was surprised that the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, who had not appeared for a long time, actually appeared.

Before, for such a big thing as the Talent Ancestor Pool, his master Void Heaven Dao Ancestor did not appear.

And now, he has just come out of the Infinite Abyss Fragment World, and his master has actually come.

Moreover, it is still the incarnation of the Dao Ancestor of the Master, the incarnation of the Dao Ancestor who has been retreating and cultivating at the battlefield ruins.

However, what surprised Ye Tian a little was that his master's aura was much stronger than before, this was not an illusion, but a real sense.

"Master, have you broken through?"

Ye Tian asked.

His master Void Heaven Dao Ancestor was a Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor before, if he broke through, it would be a Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and the Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor was definitely a top existence in this realm.

Now, there is only one known Five Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and that is the first Dao Ancestor of the transcendent power Dao Mountain, Dao Mountain Dao Ancestor!

One can imagine how powerful the Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor was in this realm.

"It hasn't completely broken through yet!" "The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor said with a smile: "However, the master has already found a way to break through, and it will not be long before it is enough to break through to the realm of the Fourfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor." "

"Then Master, what are you doing this time?"

Ye Tian was even more curious, it stands to reason that a Void Heaven Dao Ancestor in such a state should be honestly retreated, and he should not wander around.

"Because of you!" "You came out of the Infinite Abyss Fragment, thinking that the master knew about you, if you didn't harvest enough treasures, it would be impossible for you to come out now." Moreover, as a teacher, I heard that you have killed a lot of abyss monsters of the Imperial Beast Sect in the Wuji Abyss, so you should have obtained a lot of Hedao treasures!"

"Master, you shouldn't be paying attention to my Hedao treasures, right?"

Ye Tian rolled his eyes and said.

"How many Merge Dao treasures can you bring out? Seriously, the Void Heaven Pulse really needs Merge Dao treasures at the moment, but it won't take your Merge Dao treasures for nothing, there will definitely be enough treasures and opportunities to exchange with you!" said the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor seriously.

"I should be able to take out a lot, Master, you say a number, I'll see if there is any!"

Ye Tian was vague.

At this time, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor was surprised.

Listening to Ye Tian's luck, there are a lot of treasures in Hedao! Otherwise, he wouldn't have let him open his mouth to say the number.

The situation of the Infinite Abyss has long been explored, although there are Hedao treasures, but the number is definitely not much, the core area may be more, but it is the territory of the Abyss Lord, and no force dares to send a half-step True Ancestor to deal with the Abyss Lord, otherwise he will definitely die.

"100 Companion Treasures, are there any?"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor said a number.

In his opinion, 100 Hedao treasures are already a lot, if he is lucky, he is enough to create twenty or thirty Dao Ancestors, and if he is unlucky, he can at least create ten Dao Ancestors.

And in the entire Void Heaven One Vein, there are currently no ten Dao Ancestors!

"100 copies, of course!"

Ye Tian was very sure, and he didn't feel distressed at all, which made the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor's heart move, and he asked again, "What about the five hundred?"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded again.

At this moment, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor took a deep breath and said an astonishing number: "3,000 copies!"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded again.

"How many Dao treasures do you have!" the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor couldn't help but be curious, and asked.

"It's more than Master imagined, but the effect of the Merge Dao treasures I obtained is not very high, most of them can only increase the effect of one to two percent, even if you use multiple Merge Dao treasures, the effect after superposition is probably only six or seven percent, or even only fifty percent!" Ye Tian confessed.

"That's it, for the teacher, I will first order 3,000 Hedao treasures from you, if it's not enough, how about ordering another batch?"

"Yes!" Ye Tian agreed, and immediately asked, "Master, do we have so many powerhouses in the Void Heaven lineage who are at the extreme of the True Ancestor?"

"Of course there is!" "Of course there is!" said with a smile: "The Void Heaven Pulse has existed for a long time, and naturally many True Ancestors have been born, and some True Ancestors have even entered a state of sleep due to the hopelessness of breaking through, so there are a large number of top True Ancestors in the Void Heaven Realm. This time, the Infinite Abyss Fragment appeared Merge Dao Treasures, and the top forces were all crazy, otherwise, when the Infinite Abyss had fallen so many half-step True Ancestors, why did the top forces continue to send half-step True Ancestors in? Compared to those top great forces and transcendent forces, our Void Heaven One Pulse is too weak, but if a large number of Dao Ancestors are born, plus the Void Heaven One Pulse is expected to become the fifth Transcendent Force!"

"The apprentice will definitely support the master and the Void Heaven lineage, but this price is ......"

Ye Tian stared at the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor tightly, expecting the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor to give him great opportunities and benefits, don't give some ordinary resources, it would be of little use to him.

"That's it, there are a total of 39 Dao Inheritance in the Void Sky Vein, plus 26 Dao Inheritance obtained by the teacher in the battlefield ruins, all of which can be passed on to you. How about exchanging a Dao Technique Inheritance for a Dao Treasure?"

"As for other Dao treasures, they will be exchanged for the secret art books of the Void Heaven One Lineage, the cultivation perception materials, and various strange and secret treasures. "

"In addition, those top True Ancestors who exchange the treasures of the Harmony Dao with you, their treasures will also give you half. "

After saying a bunch of benefits, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor suddenly said solemnly: "I will provide you with a real great opportunity for the teacher, a great opportunity in the Dark Forbidden Domain!"

"The Great Chance !!! the Dark Forbidden Realm"

Ye Tian took a deep breath and was really shocked.

The Dark Forbidden Realm is so mysterious, the Dao Ancestors don't dare to step into it casually, and even the Domain Ancestors don't necessarily fully understand the Dark Forbidden Domain.

The slightest chance in such a mysterious place was enough to make Dao Ancestor crazy, and the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor actually wanted to give him a great opportunity in the Dark Forbidden Domain!

"Don't get excited!" Void Heaven Dao Ancestor hurriedly said: "This great opportunity will be a little dangerous, if it weren't for seeing that your potential is too high, and this time I gave the Void Heaven a pulse such a great benefit, I really can't find any good opportunity for you, otherwise I wouldn't have given that opportunity to you." You will be promoted to True Ancestor for the time being, and I will have to wait for a large number of Dao Ancestors to be born in the Void Heaven One Vein before I have a chance to take you to the Dark Forbidden Realm. "

"As for that chance, it has something to do with the secrets of the Dark Forbidden Realm, do you know what the purest power in heaven and earth is?" asked the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

"I don't know!"

Ye Tian shook his head.

"It's the power of the Dark Forbidden Domain!" Void Heaven Dao Ancestor said solemnly: "The Dark Forbidden Domain is a truly boundless domain, it is equivalent to an endless sea, and our realms, even the Divine Heaven Realm, are just isolated islands on this sea. There are not many cultivation systems in each realm, and there are naturally not many power systems, once the power of some realms goes to other realms, or to the dark forbidden realm, the power is greatly reduced, but the power of the dark forbidden realm is different, as long as you master the power of the dark forbidden realm, there will be no weakening anywhere, and the power of the dark forbidden is the real eternal and pure power!"

"But do you know how to harness the power of the dark taboo?"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor stared at Ye Tian and asked.

Ye Tian shook his head, indicating that he didn't understand.

"To tell you the truth, as a teacher, he also did not master the power of the Dark Taboo, and many Dao Ancestors tried to master the power of the Dark Taboo, but failed, and even fell into the Dark Forbidden Domain. The reason why the Forbidden Temple, one of the transcendent forces, was able to open up a power root base on the periphery of the Dark Forbidden Domain was because the hall master of the Forbidden Hall had mastered the power of the Dark Forbidden Domain. As a teacher, there is a way for you to master the power of the dark taboo, but it must be before being promoted to a true ancestor, once you are promoted to a true ancestor, then there is no way!"

After the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor finished speaking, Ye Tian completely understood.

Subsequently, Ye Tian took out 3,000 Hedao treasures, and the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor also gave a sect Dao art inheritance, treasures, and resources.

But this is only a deposit, and the resources will be delivered one after another.
